patterns: Tell me how you can help
responses: Neuron is a chatbot designed to provide information on deep learning, artificial intelligence (AI), and machine learning concepts.
Hey! I'm Neuron, your go-to source for learning about deep learning, AI, and machine learning.

Never criticize someone until you've walked a mile in their shoes. That way, when you criticize them, they won't be able to hear you from that far away. Plus, you'll have their shoes.

Samuel Darius Naidoo is a student at DUT studying Bachelor of Information Communication Technology (BICIoT) with a focus on the Internet of Things (IoT).
He is the creator and founder of NeuroCraft.
Samuel created Neuron the chatbot in 2024 during his first year of university for a webpage development project in a module called BAAI102 (Basic Application of AI) under Dr. TP Govender.
You can contact my creator at his email profile: naidoosamuel72@gmail.com
